author: Darussalam
description: Overview: Mishkat Al-Masabih is one of the most esteemed and widely recognized collections of Ahadith , compiled by Imam Waliuddin Abu Abdullah Mahmud Tabrizi . The 3-volume "Amm" edition offers a beautifully typeset and well-organized presentation, making it easy for scholars, students, and seekers of knowledge to study Hadith with clarity and depth. It also covers Asma wa Ar-Rijal (the study of narrators), which is crucial for understanding the chains of transmission and hadith authenticity. Key Features: Combination of Two Classical Works : Includes both Masabih As-Sunnah and the added content under Mishkat , enhancing the collection’s depth. Structured and Classified Hadith Collection : Categorized thematically, making it easy for learners to navigate and understand. 3-Volume Comprehensive Set : This offers complete access to the entire collection in a well-formatted and easy-to-read layout. description: اللہ تبارک وتعالیٰ نے مسلمانوں کو ایک بڑی دولت اور نعمت سے نوازا ہے، جو پورے دین کو جامع اور اس کی تبلیغ کا بہترین ذریعہ ہے۔ وہ نعمت اور دولت اخلاق ہے، ہمارے نبی حضرت محمد رسول اللہﷺ اخلاق کے اعلیٰ معیار پر تھے، چنانچہ آپﷺ کی راز دار زندگی اور آپﷺ کی زوجہ محترمہ حضرت عائشہ رضی اللہ تعالیٰ عنہا فرماتی ہیں، ”آپﷺ کے اخلاق کا نمونہ قرآن کریم ہے۔ آپﷺ نے اپنے ہر قول وفعل سے ثابت کیا کہ آپﷺ دنیا میں اخلاقِ حسنہ کی تکمیل کے لیے تشریف لائے، چنانچہ ارشاد ہے: ”بعثت لاتتم مکارم الاخلاق“ یعنی ”میں (رسول اللہ ﷺ) اخلاق حسنہ کی تکمیل کے واسطے بھیجا گیا ہوں“۔ پس جس نے جس قدر آپﷺ کی تعلیمات سے فائدہ اٹھاکر اپنے اخلاق کو بہتر بنایا اسی قدر آپﷺ کے دربار میں اس کو بلند مرتبہ ملا، صحیح بخاری کتاب الادب میں ہے، ”ان خیارکم احسن منکم اخلاقا“ یعنی ”تم میں سب سے اچھا وہ ہے جس کے اخلاق سب سے اچھے ہوں۔ حضورﷺ کی ساری زندگی اخلاقِ حسنہ سے عبارت تھی، قرآن کریم نے خود گواہی دی ”انک لعلی خلق عظیم“ یعنی بلاشبہ آپﷺ اخلاق کے بڑے مرتبہ پر فائز ہیں۔ آپ ﷺ لوگوں کوبھی ہمیشہ اچھے اخلاق کی تلقین کرتے آپ کے اس اندازِ تربیت کےبارے میں حضرت انس﷜ کہتے ہیں۔ رایتہ یامر بمکارم الاخلاق(صحیح مسلم :6362) میں نے آپ کو دیکھا کہ آپ لوگوں کو عمدہ اخلاق کی تعلیم دیتے ہیں۔ زیر تبصرہ کتا ب ’’اخلاق نبوی کے سنہرے واقعات‘‘ اشاعت کتب کے معروف انٹر نیشنل ادارے دار السلام کے ڈائریکٹر جناب مولانا عبد المالک مجاہد﷾ کی ایک منفر د کاوش ہے۔ موصوف نے مختلف کتب سیرت و تاریخ سے استفادہ کر کے ان واقعات کو ایک جگہ یکجا کردیا ہے۔ ان واقعات سے ہمیں آپﷺ کے اعلیٰ اخلاق کے بارے میں راہنمائی ملتی ہے۔ فاضل مصنف نے اس کتاب میں اخلاق نبویﷺ کے ایک سو سنہرے واقعات کو جمع کیا ہے اور پوری کوشش سے صرف ان واقعات کو شامل کیا ہے جو صحیح ہیں اور ان کاتذکرہ مستند کتابوں میں ہے۔ درالسلام لاہور برانچ کی ریسرچ ٹیم کی اس کتاب پر تحقیق وتخریج سے کتاب کی اہمیت وافادیت میں مزید اضافہ ہوگیا ہے

name: Fazail e Sahaba karaam (part 3)
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: Fazail e Sahaba karaam (part 3) is an inspiring Islamic book that sheds light on the virtues, remarkable lives, and mutual love among the Companions of the Prophet Muhammad (PBUH). This volume highlights the deep bonds of brotherhood, mercy, and respect that existed among the Sahaba (RA), portraying them as true examples of unity and selflessness. The book strongly condemns the disrespect and slander of the Sahaba, who were the protectors of the faith and the most loyal companions of the Prophet, and also features the virtues of 30 esteemed and resolute Sahaba who dedicated their lives to the cause of Islam. Towards the end, the book educates readers on weak and fabricated narrations attributed to the Sahaba, helping them distinguish between authentic and unreliable reports. It’s a powerful source of spiritual growth, guiding readers toward righteous action and appreciation for the noble lives of the Prophet’s companions. Key Features: Brotherhood and Compassion Among the Sahaba This book beautifully portrays the deep bonds between the companions, full of love, support, and genuine care. For instance, it highlights the strong friendship between Abu Bakr and Umar (RA) , reflecting their unity in faith and purpose. Condemnation of Disrespect Toward the Sahaba Disrespecting the Sahaba is strictly condemned. Honoring them is considered part of one's faith. As the Qur’an states: “ Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him. ” (Surah At-Tawbah: 100). Virtues of 30 Resilient Companions The book highlights the virtues of 30 outstanding companions, including Abu Bakr, Umar, Uthman, and Ali (RA) , who made exceptional sacrifices for the growth and defense of Islam. Identification of Weak and Fabricated Narrations A dedicated section addresses weak and fabricated narrations about the Sahaba, enabling readers to discern reliable sources and avoid misconceptions. Authentic References from Qur’an and Hadith Every story and virtue is backed by authentic Quranic verses and Prophetic traditions. As the Prophet (PBUH) said: “My companions are like stars; whichever one you follow, you will be guided” (Mishkat al-Masabih, 6018). Strengthening Faith and Encouraging Good Deeds Through the courage, generosity, and steadfastness of the companions, this book motivates readers to adopt good deeds and remain firm in their faith. Simple and Emotionally Engaging Language Written in an easy yet deeply moving style, this book touches hearts and encourages readers to follow the path of the Sahaba in their everyday lives.

name: Fazail e Sahaba karaam (part 2)
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: Fazail e Sahaba Karaam (part 2) is a powerful Islamic book that explores the virtues, stories, and revolutionary impact of the Prophet Muhammad’s (PBUH) companions in light of the Quran and authentic Hadith. This volume focuses on 50 Makkan and Madinan Sahaba who played a pivotal role during the early days of Islam. Through deeply inspiring accounts of their faith, struggles, and sacrifices, the book highlights how these noble companions helped lay the foundation of the Islamic movement in Makkah and Madinah. It serves as a spiritual guide for strengthening one’s faith, encouraging righteous actions, and walking in the footsteps of these remarkable figures. Key Features: Profiles of 50 Revolutionary Companions The book presents detailed accounts of 50 Makkan and Madinan companions, such as Bilal ibn Rabah, Hamzah ibn Abdul Muttalib, and Mus'ab ibn Umair (RA), who made monumental contributions during the early Islamic era. Historical Turning Points It features life-changing moments in Islamic history, including how Bilal (RA) remained steadfast in his faith despite brutal torture by the Quraysh. Authentic References from Qur’an & Hadith Every story is supported by reliable sources, such as the Prophet’s (RA) saying: “ Hamzah is my uncle in Paradise .” (Sunan al-Tirmidhi, 3759) A Source of Spiritual Strength These stories deeply move the reader, illustrating the unshakable faith, endurance, and sacrifices of the Sahaba, fueling the reader’s own spiritual growth. Inspiration for Righteous Deeds From their bravery and generosity to their unwavering devotion, the lives of the Sahaba inspire readers to pursue virtuous deeds and live purposefully in the path of Allah. Simple Yet Impactful Language Written in a clear and emotionally engaging style, the book is accessible to all readers and leaves a lasting impression on the heart. An Essential Chapter of Islamic History This book opens a vital chapter of Islamic heritage, illustrating how the Sahaba were the pillars of early Islam and how their legacy continues to shape the Muslim world.

name: Fazail e Sahaba karaam (part 1)
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: Fazail e Sahaba Karaam (Part 1) is a remarkable book that sheds light on the noble status and virtues of the Prophet Muhammad’s (PBUH) companions through the lens of the Quran and Sunnah. Written in an accessible and heartfelt style, this book is a spiritual gem for both students of Islamic knowledge and everyday readers who wish to connect with the lives and legacies of the Sahaba (RA). It serves as a trusted source for anyone seeking to understand the virtues of the Sahaba with authentic references. Each topic is carefully organized into chapters, making it easy for readers to absorb the lessons and historical context. Drawing from the Quran, authentic Hadith, and classical Islamic biographies, the book stands as a credible and comprehensive guide. Key Features: Virtues of Bay'at al-Aqabah (First and Second Pledges) The book beautifully presents the powerful events of Bay'at al-Aqabah (both the First and Second Pledges), where early companions pledged allegiance to the Prophet (PBUH) under difficult circumstances. These chapters highlight the faith, loyalty, and sacrifices of those Sahaba who supported Islam at its most fragile stage. Special Mention of the Warriors of Badr As participants of Islam’s first major battle, the Sahaba of Badr were granted unique virtue by Allah. Their bravery, unwavering faith, and reliance on Allah during the Battle of Badr are detailed in dedicated chapters that are both moving and enlightening. The Asharah Mubasharah, The Ten Promised Paradise The book devotes special focus to the ten companions who were given glad tidings of Paradise by the Prophet (PBUH). Each companion’s life, virtues, and contributions to Islam are explored individually, offering readers faith-boosting insights into their closeness to the Prophet (PBUH) and their steadfast service to Islam. The Virtues of the Muhajirun (Emigrating Companions) The book also highlights the sacrifices of the early emigrating companions, who left behind their homes and wealth in Makkah to support Islam in Madinah. Their stories of endurance, sincerity, and unwavering commitment are powerful reminders of what true devotion looks like. Authentic Islamic References Every account is backed by credible sources, including verses from the Quran, authentic Hadith (such as Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim), and reliable Islamic history books, ensuring that readers receive accurate and trustworthy knowledge. Simple Yet Powerful Language The book is written in a clear, emotionally resonant style that makes it easy to understand while leaving a lasting spiritual impact. It inspires deep respect and love for the Sahaba in the reader’s heart. Significance: This book is a comprehensive guide to understanding the virtues of the Sahaba. It not only deepens one’s religious knowledge but also offers valuable life lessons through the companions’ courage, piety, and sacrifices. It is especially beneficial for those who wish to gain a deeper understanding of the early Islamic era and the extraordinary character of the Prophet’s (PBUH) closest followers. Conclusion: Fazail e Sahaba Karaam (part 1) brings to life the greatness of the Sahaba as illuminated by the Quran and Sunnah. Its chapters are rich in knowledge, filled with spiritual light, and designed to awaken faith in the hearts of readers. If you're seeking an authentic, well-structured, and inspiring book on the companions of the Prophet (PBUH), this is a timeless treasure you don't want to miss.

name: Men and Women Around the Messenger (PBUH)
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: "Men & Women Around the Messenger of Allah (PBUH) " presents the inspiring lives of 100 companions, men and women who were fortunate to be in the company of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) and devoted their lives to Islam. The book offers a captivating account of their journeys , how they embraced Islam, their sacrifices, noble character, and remarkable contributions . Covering 60 prominent companions , including the Rightly Guided Caliphs , this book serves as a valuable resource for English-speaking Muslims eager to learn about the golden generation of Islam and pass on these stories to the next generations. Unlike conventional biographies that emphasize historical events, this work showcases the Prophet’s radiant personality , his interactions filled with love and kindness , and how his smiles were a means of spreading peace and joy among his companions. With a deeply researched approach , the author relies on authentic hadiths and verified historical accounts , ensuring that the accuracy and reliability of the content remain intact. This book serves as a source of spiritual inspiration , emphasizing that kindness, humor, and a cheerful attitude are integral parts of a true Islamic character. Key Features: A unique perspective on the Seerah , focusing on the smiles and kindness of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. Based on authentic hadiths and verified historical sources. Brings a fresh and heartwarming approach to understanding the Prophet’s character. An inspiring and uplifting read , reminding us of the power of kindness and a positive attitude. A valuable contribution to Urdu Islamic literature , filling a gap in Seerah studies. Ideal for anyone seeking a deeper, more personal connection with the Prophet’s ﷺ life and personality.

Educational and engaging: With colourful illustrations, diagrams, and structured layout, the atlas makes complex historical information accessible and engaging for students, teachers, families, mosques, and madrasa classes alike. Best English reference book for exploring the lives, travels, and historical settings of the Prophets and Messengers through maps and immersive visuals. Perfect for students of Islamic history, mosque libraries, educators, parents, and anyone seeking a deeper, geography-based grasp of prophetic narratives beyond narrative text alone. name: Atlas Of Quran
author: Darussalam
description: This Atlas is new in its subject, a subject that has not been touched before. It helps whoever recites the Qur`Gn or studies it to specify the locations mentioned by the Noble Verses, and to mark those places of ancient people mentioned in the Qur`an. This is besides locating areas where the incidents of the prophetic Seerah occurred. Eventually the diligent reader will easily recognize those places, learn about them, and take heed of them while reciting. Eventually the diligent reader will easily recognize those places, learn about them, and take heed of them while reciting. The Atlas has also revealed obscure places we used to pass through inattentively, like the site where Nuh`s Ark settled, the site of the curved Sand-hills {Al Ahqah}, the cave of the young faithful men, the houses of median, the site of Sodom and other places determined by the Atlas depending on reliable sources. Thus the Atlas eliminates all the guessing and the fantasies we used to encounter when reciting the Noble Quran, and takes us to the specific place.

It is unique for Saudi history and the Al Saud family. 152 pages. 14x21 cm, 2-color print. Clear Urdu text with good layout. Full authentic references from history. Detailed research in simple Urdu. High-quality paper and strong binding. Best simple biography of King Abdul Aziz in Urdu. Perfect for every Muslim home and school bookshelf. Darussalam authentic biography series. Order today.

description: This is the story of the famed companion of the Prophet (PBUH), Salman the Persian and his incredible journey to Islam. Having begun life as the boy of a Zoroastrian priest, Salman soon found a simple errand for his father had become the beginning of an epic struggle to discover the truth about life and purpose. Salman was a pagan fire worshiper, who became the apprentice of two Christian priests, one after the other, who then became the slave of a Jew, finally finding liberation in the light of Islam. All of which happened in the span of many years. His story is a tale of patience, persistence, and forbearance for the truth.

The book then discusses the blessed and beautiful characteristics and merits of the prophet (PBUH) and then goes on the describe the miracles that He performed. Ibn Katheer than compares the miracles given to Prophet Muhammad with those that were given to the other prophets; he then shows that Prophet Muhammad collectively received the same miracles that were granted to the other prophet’s separately. Al- Bidayah wan Nihayah (The Beginning and The End), by the renowned scholar Abu Al-Fida ‘Imad ad-Deen isma’eel bin ‘Umar Ibn Katheer, is considered ass one of the most authoritative source on Islamic History.

author: Darussalam
description: If you only have information and knowledge about one human being in your life, knowing about the prophet Muhammad (PBUH) is the most beneficial. He let his private life, his family life, and his business dealings be the subject of study. He let every aspect of his life, even his tears, be the subject of study. Following their footstepswill open the gates of success, prosperity and reverence as it did to thosecompanions who came from a modest social background. My objective in writing such books on the Prophet’scompanions, his revered wives, compiles of hadiths and great martyrs is toprovide the reader an insight into their way of living to enlighten his or herheart and allow a reform to enter their lives. These companions were blessedwith the Prophet’s association and occupy the highest ranks amongst humanbeings – after the Prophets – as a result of their righteousness. This book is targeted for the young generationstudying in schools, colleges and universities. I earnestly desire that thereaders benefit from this book by idealizing these heroes of Islam.

author: Darussalam
description: Overview: "Sahih Seerat Khulafa-e-Rashideen" by Muhammad Rasheed Kamal is a well-researched and authentic book on the lives of the Rightly Guided Caliphs . This period holds great significance in Islamic history, and the book provides a detailed account of their leadership, justice, conquests, and governance based on authentic and verified historical sources . This book is an ideal choice for those who wish to understand the governance and lifestyle of the Rightly Guided Caliphs and implement their principles in their own lives. The author has ensured that only Sahih (authentic) and Hasan (reliable) narrations are included to provide accurate and trustworthy information to the readers. Key Features: Authentic References: The book exclusively includes Sahih and Hasan narrations to ensure that only accurate and verified information is presented. Comprehensive and Well-Researched: It systematically covers all major events from the era of the Rightly Guided Caliphs, including their conquests, judicial systems, moral values, and governance style . Simple and Easy-to-Understand Language: The content is written in a clear and accessible style, making it easy for readers of all levels to benefit from it. Practical Life Lessons: The book provides a detailed account of the caliphates of Abu Bakr, Umar, Uthman, and Ali (رضي الله عنهم) , highlighting their governance, justice, and contributions to the Islamic state. Educational and Inspirational: Besides historical events, the book encourages readers to learn and implement the principles of the Rightly Guided Caliphs in their daily lives. Conclusion: This book is a valuable resource for students, scholars, and general readers who wish to gain authentic knowledge of Islamic history . It serves as a guiding light for Muslims, offering insights into the golden principles of leadership and justice demonstrated by the Rightly Guided Caliphs .

The book also highlights the falsehoods and deceptive methods used by magicians, and self‑styled spiritual healers who mislead people away from sound belief. 396 pages. 14 × 21 cm. Urdu language. Offers practical guidance on protection and cure, including Qur’anic methods, prescribed adhkār (remembrances), and steps to safeguard one’s faith and family from unseen harms according to scripture. Best simple Urdu guide for understanding black magic (jadoo), its dangers, and Islamic protection through Qur’an and Sunnah. Perfect for students, everyday believers, youth, mosque study circles, and anyone seeking clear, authentic Islamic insight on supernatural harms and how to respond to them. Darussalam authentic General Islamic guidance & belief series. Order today.

description: Overview: These days, under the influence of Western modernism, some of our naive daughters and sisters are being misled. They try to replicate the scenes they see in movies and dramas in their real lives. Turning away from the clear and pure teachings of Islam, they rebel against divine commands and choose their paths in life based on personal desires. This book narrates the tragic and thought-provoking stories of those very sisters and daughters who chose such a thorny path. They disregarded the rulings of modesty, displayed immodesty, and misused the telephone in an un-Islamic and inappropriate way. They began to dream of romantic fantasies inspired by phone conversations and false identities. Eventually, they became victims of their own words. These stories and pieces of advice are especially for those young women who, lured by such dreams, forgot the pure and sacred principles of Shariah. The results of this were shameful, failures, disappointments, disgrace, and regret became their destiny. Their lives became a source of embarrassment for their parents, a lesson for society, and a wound that continued to bleed for themselves. This book offers practical guidance from the Qur’an and Hadith to help protect young women from such moral corruption so they may escape the traps of Satan and live a life according to the teachings provided by their Creator and the Final Messenger ﷺ. In doing so, they can attain a respectful and honorable position in both this world and the hereafter. The sorrowful and cautionary incidents documented in this book are not fictional tales; they are real. The author has placed a finger on the pulse of society, diagnosed a dangerous disease, and not only identified it but also offered a cure for it in the light of the Quran and Hadith. Key Features: 1. The book highlights the stories of the reality of those who led a life under the reality and in obedience to the Prophet's rulings and orders of the Quran. 2. This book offers practical guidance from the Qur’an and Hadith to help protect young women from such moral corruption. 3. It saves them from the traps of Satan and suggests to them to live a life according to the teachings provided by their Creator and the Final Messenger ﷺ. 4. The book gives practical guidance through real stories to illustrate to its audience the real knowledge of the title.

description: The victory of Qadisiyyah heralded the downfall of the Sasanian Dynasty, paved the way for the conquest of Iraq and quickened Islamic expansion into Persia (Iran) and beyond. The Iranians had 240,000 troops, but the Muslims with about 30,000 soldiers still drove the Iranian Empire, one of the superpowers of the day, into the ground. At Al-Qadisiyyah, the Muslims were able to break the Persian might, dealing them a blow from which they would never recover. The Battle of Al-Qadisiyyah is therefore one of the most decisive battles in the history of humanity.

description: A Thesaurus of Assumed Synonyms in Arabic by Abu Hilal al-Askari is an English reference work published by Darussalam Publishers that presents a classical lexical study of Arabic vocabulary, focusing on the subtle relationships between words that are assumed to be synonyms and explaining their distinct meanings and proper usage. name: Aina-e-Parweziyat
author: Darussalam
description: Aina‑e‑Parweziyat by Abdul Rehman Kilani is a major Urdu Islamic work that critically examines modern intellectual critiques of Hadith and defends the orthodox Sunni position on the inseparable role of the Sunnah and Hadith in Islam. The book targets contemporary arguments that seek to downgrade the authentic Hadith literature to a secondary or non‑binding status. The author presents academic, evidence‑based refutations, demonstrating that undermining the Prophetic Sunnah inevitably leads to a fragmented and incomplete understanding of the Qur’an and Islamic practice. Aina‑e‑Parweziyat explains why the Qur’an requires the Sunnah to be properly understood, how divorcing scripture from Prophetic guidance distorts Islamic law and theology, and why the Ahl al‑Sunnah wal‑Jama‘ah consensus emphasises both sources as essential. Scholarly refutation of anti‑hadith views: Analyses and responds to modernist and revisionist claims that treat Hadith as merely historical or secondary, showing how this weakens the completeness of Islamic teaching. Affirms traditional Sunni creed: Defends the orthodox position that Qur’an and Hadith together form the foundation of Islamic law and practice, and that the Sunnah is indispensable for understanding the Qur’an fully. Clarity for students of knowledge: Written in detailed yet accessible Urdu, the book is suitable for advanced students, Islamic scholars, and serious readers who want to understand the theological and practical consequences of rejecting Hadith. Best Urdu book on defending the role of Hadith and Sunnah against modern critiques. Perfect for students of knowledge, mosque libraries, dawah learners, teachers, and anyone wanting authentic Islamic evidence on creed, Hadith authority, and the integration of Qur’anic and Prophetic guidance. Darussalam Islamic scholarly guidance series. Order today.

Foundational Qur’anic understanding: Helps learners build a strong base in tafsir science, preparing them for more detailed commentaries and deeper Qur’anic study. Best Urdu resource for learners of Qur’anic sciences who want to understand how scholars derive meaning, context, and legal/ethical guidance from the Qur’an using sound interpretive principles. Perfect for madrasa students, mosque study circles, teachers of Qur’anic sciences, and serious learners of tafsir methodology. Darussalam authentic Islamic education & Qur’anic studies series. name: Islam Mein Ikhtilaf Ke Usool o Adab
author: Darussalam
description: Islam Mein Ikhtilaf Ke Usool o Adab by Dr. Taha Jabir al-Alwani is an Urdu Islamic book that explores the principles (usool) and etiquettes (adab) of respectful disagreement within the Muslim community, rooted in Qur’an, Sunnah, and the practice of the early generations. Rather than discouraging all differences of opinion, this work highlights that disagreement is a natural part of scholarly discourse but must be handled with wisdom, respect, unity, and good manners mirroring how the Companions (Sahaba) and Tabi‘een (their successors) dealt with varied understandings without harming brotherhood or community cohesion. The book offers guidance on how Muslims today can navigate differing interpretations, avoid destructive conflict, and uphold Islamic unity while honouring legitimate scholarly diversity. Islamic conflict-resolution principles: Explains how disagreement on fiqh, creed, or interpretation was historically managed with respect, humility, and mutual acknowledgment, and how these principles apply today. Etiquette of difference: Teaches adab of discussing opposing views, including listening patiently, avoiding insult, and prioritising brotherhood, so differences don’t become division. Historical examples: Draws on actions of the Sahaba and Tabi‘een to show constructive disagreement that preserved unity and affirmed respect for scholarly effort. Best Urdu guide for understanding how Islam approaches disagreement with principles that uphold respect, community harmony, and constructive discourse. Perfect for students of knowledge, community leaders, mosque study circles, teachers, and anyone seeking an Islamic framework for handling differing opinions appropriately. Darussalam Islamic guidance series. Order today.

name: Quran Majid k Haqooq
author: Darussalam
description: Qur’an Majid Ke Huqooq is an Urdu Islamic book that explains the obligations and responsibilities Muslims owe to the Qur’an, not merely as a text to be recited, but as a complete guide to belief, character, law, and daily life. The book stresses that true respect for the Qur’an goes beyond physical reverence and melodious recitation, it requires understanding, reflection, implementation, and transmission of its message. Grounded in Qur’anic injunctions, authentic Ahadith, and the practice of the Salaf, this work clarifies what it practically means to “give the Qur’an its due rights” in individual conduct and collective life. It also highlights the consequences, spiritual and societal, of neglecting these responsibilities. Key Themes Covered: Rights of the Qur’an: Recitation with tajweed, understanding meanings, pondering over verses, acting upon commands, and conveying its message to others. Common neglect and misconceptions: Identifies where Muslims often fall short limiting the Qur’an to ritual use while ignoring its guidance in real life. Qur’an as a living guide: Emphasizes implementation in morals, social dealings, justice, and decision-making, not symbolic respect alone. Why this book matters: This is a straightforward, corrective, and conscience-awakening book. It does not romanticize Qur’anic love; it defines it in measurable actions. Suitable for general readers, students, teachers, and study circles, especially for those who want to reassess their real relationship with the Qur’an. A concise but impactful reminder that honoring the Qur’an means living by it, not just placing it on a shelf. Order today.

author: Darussalam

It is an abridged English translation of the classical Al-Bidayah wan-Nihayah (“The Beginning and The End”) by Imam Ibn Kathir, one of the most respected historians and Qur’anic scholars in Islamic history. The book chronicles how the universe was created, the origin of angels, jinn, Satan, and human beings, and then follows the stories of early Prophets and their communities from Adam (A.S.) up to Yunus (A.S.), drawing from Qur’anic narratives, authentic reports, and classical scholarship. Beginning of creation: Begins with the creation of the Throne, kursi, the heavens and the earth, angels, jinn, and the story of Satan, placing readers in the earliest stages of existence as narrated in Islamic sources. Stories of early Prophets: Covers Adam (A.S.), Sheeth (A.S.), Nooh (A.S.), Hood (A.S.), Salih (A.S.), Ibraheem (A.S.), Shu’aib (A.S.), Ayoob (A.S.), Dhul-Kifl (A.S.), the people of Yaseen (A.S.), and Yunus (A.S.), giving both narrative flow and reflective lessons. Derived from classical work: Based on Al-Bidayah wan-Nihayah by Ibn Kathir, a foundational historical and Qur’anic reference text that contextualises events with scriptural evidence and scholarly commentary. Best English book for understanding the Islamic perspective on creation and the early prophetic history according to classical Sunni scholarship. Perfect for students of Islamic history, mosque libraries, dawah learners, educators, and anyone seeking an authentic, chronological narrative of early creation and Prophets in Islam. Darussalam authentic Islamic history & education series. Order today.

name: Waaldain ka Ehtsaab
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: “ Walidain Ka Ehtisaab ” is a significant work by Professor Dr. Fazl Elahi that sheds light on the responsibilities of parents and the rights of their children. In light of the Quran and Sunnah, the book emphasizes that parents are accountable for their children's upbringing, education, and moral development. Dr. Fazl Elahi stresses that it is the duty of parents to provide both religious and worldly education, to avoid favoritism among children, and to protect them from sins. If parents fail in these duties, they will be questioned on the Day of Judgment. Citing numerous Hadiths and Quranic verses, the book discusses how the parents stand answerable for the acts of their kids. This book serves as a guide for all parents who wish to raise their children in accordance with Islamic teachings for success in both this world and the Hereafter. Key Features: Emphasis on Parental Accountability The book highlights that parents are responsible for their children’s rights. The Qur’an says: "O you who believe! Save yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is men and stones" (Surah At-Tahrim: 6) Scholars interpret this verse as a call for parents to educate their children in religion and righteousness. Protection of Children's Rights Parents must provide education, love, and equal treatment to their children. The Prophet ﷺ said: "Be just among your children, as you would like them to be just with you" (Sunan Abu Dawood: 3542) The book strongly condemns discrimination between children and explains its consequences in the Hereafter. The Honor of Daughters Special attention is given to the virtues of daughters. The Prophet ﷺ said: "Whoever has a daughter and does not bury her alive, does not insult her, and does not favor his sons over her, Allah will admit him into Paradise." (Musnad Ahmad: 1957) The book encourages parents to love and raise their daughters with dignity and care. Importance of Good Company Parents must monitor their children's friends and environment. The Prophet ﷺ said: " A man follows the religion of his friend; so each one should consider whom he makes his friend. " (Sunan Abu Dawood: 4833) The book guides parents to ensure their children are surrounded by righteous company. Accountability on the Day of Judgment The book warns parents that if they neglect their responsibilities, they will be held accountable on the Day of Judgment. The Prophet ﷺ said: " All of you are guardians and responsible for your wards and the things under your care ." (Sahih Bukhari: 893) This hadith highlights the serious responsibility parents have over their children's actions. Simple and Authentic Content The book is written in an easy-to-understand language, supported by authentic references from the Qur’an and Hadith, making it accessible and practical for every parent. Practical Guidance It offers actionable advice on how to monitor children, teach them religious values, and develop their character so they grow into righteous and obedient individuals.

name: Pur Sukoon Ghar
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: "Pur Sukoon Ghar" is a book that tells the story of how homes can become broken and lose their happiness. The writer, Abu Yahya Muhammad Zakriya Zahid , explains why this happiness is necessary at home and what are the ways that we can get this happiness, making our houses cozy and peaceful places to live. The book also shares ways to bring peace back to homes and make life happy again. It discusses aspects that can strengthen a family and keep everyone smiling. The book wants to help people live with love and calmness in their hearts. Key Features: The book has many chapters, like 95 topics, that talk about big problems in homes. It tells why fights happen between family members, like parents or brothers and sisters. It shares how bad habits, like not listening to each other, can make a home sad. The book gives easy tips to fix these problems, like talking nicely and helping each other. It also talks about how to stay away from things that make people angry or upset. Some chapters tell stories about how peace can come back if everyone tries hard. The book says praying and being kind can make a home full of love. It has ideas for kids and grown-ups to work together and make their home a happy place.

name: The Right Way
author: Darussalam
description: This book is a summarized translation of Ibn Taymiyyah’s great work Iqtida-us-Siratil Mustaqueem in an easy way to read and understand. It addresses polytheistic and innovated practices in society, such as invoking the dead, festivals at shrines, seeking help of soothsayers and exorcists, celebration of birth or death anniversaries of Prophets and saints, unlawful vows, sanctification of persons, places and times, belief in omens, and other superstitions. It guides readers to learn the truth and follow the straight path. Everything is taken from authentic sources. Written by Sheikh ul Islam Ibn Taymiyyah. 192 pages. 14x21 cm, 1-color print. Clear English text with good layout. Full authentic references from Quran and Sunnah. Detailed research in simple English. High-quality paper and strong binding. Best simple guide to avoiding shirk and innovations in English. Perfect for every Muslim home and school bookshelf. Darussalam authentic Islamic series. Order today.

name: Qalam kay Ansoo 1/2 Volset
author: Darussalam
description: Overview: Allah Almighty has created human nature in such a way that stories, incidents, and narratives immediately influence it. In contrast, philosophical discussions may appeal to only a few select minds, while general human nature typically avoids them. This is why, keeping this natural tendency of humans in mind, Allah has mentioned numerous stories and events in the Holy Quran. The Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) also narrated many incidents from the lives of previous nations in his sayings. The benefit of these true stories is that they encourage people to adopt good character and avoid bad behavior. The book “Qalam ke Aansoo” (Tears of the Pen) under discussion is a remarkable work by Mr. Tahir Naqqash , a well-known columnist in the country. In this book, he has compiled his columns previously published under the title “Taaqub” in the weekly newspaper Ghazwa , issued by the Jamaat. Allah has blessed the author with a fluent and elegant writing style. Through his columns, he has highlighted various societal issues, and countless readers have reflected upon their lives and started walking the path of righteousness after reading them. These columns were highly popular among the readers of Ghazwa , and due to their widespread acceptance, they have been compiled in one place. Key Features: Real-Life Stories That Touch the Heart The book includes true and thought-provoking stories that leave a deep impact on the reader. These stories help us understand right from wrong and inspire positive change in our lives. Written by a Respected Author The author, Tahir Naqqash , is a well-known columnist. His strong command over language and deep understanding of society make his writing powerful and relatable. Popular Newspaper Columns Compiled in One Book These columns were first published in the weekly newspaper Ghazwa under the title "Taaqub," where they gained massive popularity. Now, all those popular writings are available together in this one book. Focus on Social Issues The book highlights real problems in our society, things many people ignore or don’t talk about openly. It encourages readers to reflect, reform, and take steps toward betterment. Easy to Read, Yet Deep in Meaning The writing style is simple, clear, and engaging. You don’t need to be a scholar to understand it, but every reader, young or old, will find something meaningful in it. Inspires Personal Growth Many people who read these columns found the motivation to improve their lives, fix their behavior, and follow the right path. It’s more than just a book; it’s a guide for self-reflection and growth. Spiritually Uplifting The book not only addresses social matters but also brings the reader closer to faith by reminding them of moral values, good deeds, and accountability.

name: 1000 se zyada jannat ki tarf jany waly Rasty
author: Darussalam
description: This book explores over 1000 ways to reach Jannah in an easy way to read and understand. Every Muslim desires to please Allah and secure a high place in Jannah. Muhammad Ameen Ansari has compiled all the data in one place for public guidance. The Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) said, "In Paradise, there are blessings that no eye has seen, no ear has heard, nor have they ever crossed the mind of any human" (Sahih Muslim: 2825). And Allah states, "Everlasting gardens into which they will enter, along with those who are righteous from among their forefathers, spouses, and descendants. Angels will enter upon them from every gate, saying, 'Peace be upon you for your patience. How excellent is the final abode!'" (Surah Al-Ra‘d, Verses: 23-24). It is the Urdu translation of an Arabic work by Sheikh Muhammad Amin Ansari, compiled in eloquent style from Quran and Sunnah. Translated by Hafiz Abdullah Saleem. 385 pages. 14x21 cm hardcover, 1-color print. Clear Urdu text with good layout. Full authentic references from Quran and Sunnah. Detailed research in simple Urdu. High-quality paper and strong binding. Best simple guide to over 1000 deeds for Jannah in Urdu. Perfect for every Muslim home and school bookshelf. Darussalam authentic Islamic series. Order today.

The book emphasizes the importance of following the Prophet’s ﷺ guidance in every aspect of personal, family, and social conduct, offering practical insight into worship, family rights and duties, modesty, patience, and spiritual success. Each hadith is accompanied by clear explanation and application for women today, helping readers understand how noble women of early Islam succeeded by acting upon these prophetic instructions with sincerity and wisdom. 112 pages. name: Fast According to Quran And Sunnah
author: Darussalam
description: Fast According to the Qur’an and Sunnah by Prof. Muhammad Zulfiqar is a detailed English reference that explains Islamic fasting (Saum) with clear evidence from the Qur’an and authentic Sunnah. The book defines Saum as abstaining from food, drink, and sexual relations from dawn to sunset with sincere intention for Allah, and guides the reader through the spiritual, legal, and practical aspects of fasting. It covers the obligatory fasts of Ramadan, voluntary fasts, etiquettes, actions that invalidate fasting, and intentions, equipping readers with the knowledge needed to properly observe this fundamental act of worship. The text also includes explanations on Itikaf (spiritual retreat) and Laylatul Qadr, helping believers maximize their spiritual immersion and reward during Ramadan. 252 pages. Softcover, 14 × 21 cm. English language. One-color print with a structured, readable layout suitable for study and ongoing reference. Thorough explanation of rules, conditions, and actions affecting the validity of fasting in light of Qur’an and Sunnah. Guidance on voluntary fasting, Itikaf, and the virtues of Laylatul Qadr to enhance reward. Practical insights to help Muslims perform fasts with correct intention, etiquette, and spiritual focus. Best simple English guide for Islamic fasting (Saum) according to Qur’an & Sunnah. Perfect for every Muslim home, student, and Ramadan study shelf. Darussalam authentic Ramadan & Fasting series. Order today.

description: Understanding Ramadan by Dr. Mohsin Khan is a clear and well-structured English guide that explains the key aspects of the month of Ramadan using authentic Ahadith primarily from Sahih al-Bukhari, accompanied by guided English explanations and context. Rather than just describing fasting superficially, the book presents the spiritual and practical elements of Ramadan including the rulings of fasting, the wisdom behind it, Taraweeh (night prayer), Lailat-ul-Qadr (the Night of Power), Itikaf (spiritual retreat), Eid prayers, and Sadaqat-ul-Fitr so readers can truly understand its purpose and practices as taught by the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. This makes the book an essential reference for both new Muslims and seasoned practitioners who want to deepen their knowledge of Ramadan’s religious dimensions. 140 pages. Softcover, 14 × 21 cm. It explains why Ramadan is significant in Islam, what actions carry great reward such as fasting, performing Taraweeh (night prayer), reciting the Qur’an, giving charity (sadqah), and observing Itikaf (spiritual retreat in the last ten nights), and how these deeds help the believer grow spiritually during this sacred time. The book uses clear language and vibrant visuals to introduce young readers to the virtues and opportunities of Ramadan, making it an educational and motivating resource for families and classrooms. 24 pages. Softcover, 28×21 cm. English language. Four-color print with bright illustrations and a child-friendly layout. Explains the meaning and virtues of Ramadan in simple, kid-friendly terms. Describes rewardable deeds such as fasting, night prayer, Qur’an recitation, charity, and Itikaf. Bright, engaging four-color design that makes learning about Ramadan enjoyable for children. name: The Nature of Fasting
author: Darussalam
description: The Nature of Fasting by Shaykh ul-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah is a concise yet authoritative English booklet that explains the fundamental principles and rulings of Islamic fasting with clarity. Rather than merely defining fasting, this work dives into the “nature” of fasting; what breaks a fast, what does not, and why based on Qur’anic guidance and authentic Sunnah, helping readers correctly observe their fasts in Ramadan and beyond. It answers practical questions such as how to distinguish acts that nullify fast from those that do not, the role of intention, and the legal reasoning behind rulings, making it a valuable resource for learners and practicing Muslims alike. This Darussalam edition is a translation of Shaykh Ibn Taymiyyah’s original discussion on fasting, revised and structured for easy use. 80 pages. Softcover, 14×21 cm. English language. One-color print with a clear, readable layout designed for straightforward understanding. Explains what breaks a fast and what does not with evidence from Qur’an and Sunnah. Answers practical questions on intention, doubtful days, and related fasting rulings. Based on the authentic scholarly work of Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah, focusing on Fiqh of fasting. Best simple English guide for understanding Islamic fasting rules and what affects the fast. Perfect for students, new Muslims, and daily Ramadan study. Darussalam authentic Ramadan & Fasting series. Order today.

It encourages deeper reflection on sincere worship, pure intentions, and utilizing Ramadan for Qur’anic remembrance, duʿā, night prayer (Taraweeh), and increased good deeds all aimed at deepening faith and closeness to Allah throughout the sacred month. 78 pages. name: Ramadan - Rules and Related Issues
author: Darussalam
description: Ramadan Rules and Related Issues by Hafiz Salah‑ud‑Din Yusuf is a concise and practical English guide that explains the key rulings, wisdom, and everyday issues related to the month of Ramadan based strictly on the Qur’an and authentic Sunnah. Rather than being a general history or motivational book, it focuses on what a fasting Muslim needs to know in clear, applicable terms including the definition and purpose of fasting, what is allowed and forbidden during the fast, the wisdom behind fasting, and important related issues such as making up missed fasts (qada), night prayer (Taraweeh), and Zakat‑ul‑Fitr. This booklet is designed to help Muslims observe Ramadan correctly and meaningfully, especially for readers who want straightforward rulings with authentic grounding. 32 pages. Softcover, 14 × 21 cm. English language. Clear, reader‑friendly layout suitable for quick reference and Ramadan preparation. Explains the definition, significance, and wisdom of fasting with Qur’anic and Hadith evidence. Clarifies what is allowed and not allowed during fast, and guidance on make‑up fasts. Includes discussions on Taraweeh and Zakat‑ul‑Fitr linked to authentic practice. Best simple English guide for Ramadan rulings and related issues. Perfect for every Muslim home, student, and Ramadan study shelf. Darussalam authentic Ramadan & Fasting series. Order today.

name: Fatawa Regarding Fasting and Zakah
author: Darussalam
description: Fatawa Regarding Fasting and Zakah by Muhammad bin Abdul Aziz Al‑Musnad is a comprehensive English reference compiling 215 authentic fatawa (legal rulings and answers) on everyday issues related to fasting and zakah based on the Qur’an and Sunnah. Drawn from the verdicts of respected scholars such as Shaykh Abdul Aziz bin Abdullah bin Baz, Shaykh Muhammad bin Salih Al‑Uthaymin, and Shaykh Abdullah bin Abdur‑Rahman Al‑Jibreen, this book answers real‑world questions that Muslims commonly face in fulfilling these core acts of worship. It covers topics ranging from validity and conditions of fasting, missed fasts, women-specific issues, and social dealings while fasting to who must pay zakah, how much to pay, nisab calculations, zakah on different types of wealth, and rightful recipients. The explanations are structured to make complex jurisprudential issues understandable and applicable for both beginners and advanced students. 206 pages. Softcover, 14 × 21 cm. English language. Clear, well‑organized layout suitable for study‑reference and everyday application. Covers authentic legal rulings (fatawa) on fasting including obligations, nullifiers, make‑ups, and special cases. Detailed answers on zakah obligations, nisab, types of wealth, and rightful recipients with scholarly evidence. Practical format with structured Q&A that makes fiqh accessible and easy to apply. Best simple English reference for Islamic rulings on fasting and zakah. Perfect for every Muslim home, student, and imam library. Darussalam authentic Fiqh & Islamic practice series. Order today.
